ab: namaka tua anema sun a vaik a sema patjangzaq?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: na maka ta palidring a ken a sema patjangezaq.
na maka tua anema timadju a vaik a sema biuyeng?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: na djemavac timadju a vaik a sema biuyeng.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: na maka ta anema sun a vaik a sema bukutu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: na maka ta hikuki a ken a vaik a sema bukutu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: na maka ta anema sun a vaik a sema bukutu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: na maka varukur aken a sema pukutu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: na maka ta anema sun a sema tjumaq?
en: How do you go home?

ab: na maka ta tjeiyun a ken a sema tjumaq.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: na maka tua anema ti tjuku a vaik a sema gakku?
en: How does tjuku go to school?

ab: na maka ta kisia ti tjuku a vaik a sema gakku.
en: tjuku goes to school by train.

ab: na maka ta anema ti piya a sema kiukay?
en: How does piya go to church?

ab: na kizidinsia ti piya a sema kiukay.
en: piya goes to church by bicycle.

ab: na maka ta tjeiyun sun a sema gakku?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ini, na maka basu a ken a sema gakku.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: na kizidinsia sun a sema gaku?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ui, na kizidinsia ken a sema gakku.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: na maka ta kautiy sun a sema takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ui, na maka kauti aken a sema takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: nu vaik sun a sema taitu maka hikuki sun manu maka kisiya sun?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: maka hikuki a ken, tjadjayaw a maka hikuki ta kisia.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: nu vaik sun a sema kiukay maka basu sun manu unting sun ta palidring?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: unting a ken ta palidring a sema kiukay tjananguaq a unting ta maka basu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: dungdung a vavelian ta nu umaq?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: inika dungdung, kiutubay a ken a sema tua vavelian.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: idungdung ta gakku a yubing?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: idudud nu djemavac djemaljun.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: idudud ta sasekezan na basu a kakanan?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: nu casaw ta ljaljevavan ta basu sa djemavac tu gu pungkang djemaljun anga.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
